### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
Fix data race.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

 - Unit test

Related changes

 - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: test: fix gofail test race.

evidence: evidence: test: fix gofail test race
